element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic ranged combat; found ammo throughout levels
Core enemy type; scouts and patrols
Fast melee enemies requiring reactive gameplay
Superior firepower; ammunition management becomes critical
Optional exploration; hidden treasure and supplies
High-health, high-damage encounter requiring learned patterns
Resource management; strategic placement rewards exploration
Sustains combat encounters; found from defeated enemies

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe room or corridor with no enemies
Clearing a room of all enemies
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced action with punctuated relief moments. Combat encounters build tension through enemy density and weapon scarcity. Relief occurs through room clearing and resource discovery. Final boss fights provide climactic tension peaks ending each episode.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Wall tiles that slide back reveal secret rooms containing treasure, health, and ammunition; visual distinction between normal and secret walls
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Suspicious or differently-textured wall tiles activate to reveal hidden chambers; requires interaction or trial to discover

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to movement and basic combat. Single guard encounters and low enemy density. Pistol-based combat with plentiful ammunition. Safe spaces for navigation learning.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy count per room. Introduction of submachine gun and dogs. Tighter ammunition management. More complex key-lock sequences and level layouts.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense enemy encounters with mixed types. Chain gun scarcity creates high-stakes combat. Boss encounters test learned enemy patterns and weapon management.
notable_spikes: Final level of each episode features boss fight with significantly higher health and damage output
Late-game levels introduce simultaneous dog and guard encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Narrow passages force head-to-head engagement with single or paired enemies. Limited space reduces dodging ability.
Large open area populated with multiple enemy types requiring rapid threat assessment and weapon switching.
Locked doors create routing choices; player must locate color-coded keys scattered across level before progressing.
Hidden chambers provide resource caches for players who explore and interact with suspicious walls; rewards curiosity.
Final level of each episode: enclosed arena with single high-health enemy; previous combat skills culminate in learned attack pattern recognition.
Reaching level exit elevator provides brief safety moment before level completion metric display.
